scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @cybershield/api & npm run dev -w @cybershield/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cybershield/api && npm run build -w @cybershield/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @cybershield/api && npm run lint -w @cybershield/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cybershield/api && npm run typecheck -w @cybershield/web
